howItWorks.intro: This welding rod consumption calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Rods Needed
rules.explanation: Each rod deposits about 60% of its length as weld metal.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How do I estimate rod consumption?
faq.a: Divide total weld length by the deposition length per rod (typically 60% of rod length).
Joint type, rod diameter, number of passes, and welder technique all impact consumption.

howWeCalculate.intro: This welding rod consumption calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
